project_common.outline_style: 2px solid outline included in sprite dimensions

shared_attributes.features: short front legs, large eyes, thick tail

context.role: Default active state animation during gameplay
context.screen_position: Fixed at x=100px from left edge, y=0 (ground level)
context.usage_scenario: Continuously displayed while game is running and player is on ground

visual_specification.shape: T-Rex dinosaur in running pose with alternating leg positions
visual_specification.texture: pixel art, flat color, no gradients

animation.description: Running cycle - frame 1: left leg forward, frame 2: right leg forward, seamless loop

visual_specification.details: Legs alternate positions, body slightly bounces, tail maintains balance, eyes open and alert

relationships.shared_with: Same dimensions and color as player_idle, player_jump, player_dead
relationships.differences_from: player_idle has slower animation (6 FPS), player_duck has different dimensions (118x60px)
